comparison: v0.10-base (2 edits) vs v0.10-robust (+正确性不为短让路)
method: 2-arm blind dual-axis on 6 edge-prone small-code tasks, 2 runs, n=12/arm, position-rotated, Sonnet high judge. Axes: minimal (no over-design/no prose padding; in-code edge handling NOT counted as verbose) + robust (does code survive the planted edges: negative/div0/empty/out-of-range/type).
verdict: PASS（精简守住、稳健 25%→58% 翻倍多）
honest_note: 58% 非满分——prompt 把 Sonnet 边界意识拉高但拉不满（能力+prompt 共同上限）。代码桶 benchmark 测精简度不测 bug 率，看不见静默 bug；本验证补的就是那个盲区。一处 minimal 回退是单次过度展开（10 行写 2 行的活），非系统性。
